'''Cardy''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a member of the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification|Garos Resistance]] and father of a small baby. He would handle their [[PLX series|Plex]], but was killed during an ambush on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy, leaving it up to [[Alexandra Winger]] to take out the remaining [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] that was escorting the convoy.<ref name="Whispers in the Dark" />
